haiku:
Bubbles rise and dance,
Fried catfish scents fill the air,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #NationalCatfishDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Woodsmoke fills the air,
Rustling leaves in crisp cool breeze,
Cozy hearts unite.
Happy #LogCabinDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful cheers resound,
Cake and dreams in the sweet air,
Pages turn with hope.
#HappyBirthdayGeorgeOrwell from @ClamBakeSanta

Chocolate waves flow wide,
Velvet dreams on silver spoons,
Sweet joy fills each bite.
Happy #NationalChocolatePuddingDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Coconuts abound,
Beneath palms, sweet breezes sigh,
Nature's gift, pure joy.
Happy #NationalCoconutDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful words take flight,
Stories weave like vibrant threads,
Hearts dance in delight.
#HappyBirthdayPearlSBuck from @ClamBakeSanta

Petals dance in breeze,
Fragrant blooms paint the earth bright,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #NationalOrangeBlossomDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright skies all around,
Laughter dances on the breeze,
Shadows play with light.
Happy #SunglassesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful voices sing,
Colors dance in bright delight,
Hearts unite in cheer.
#HappyBirthdayHelenKeller from @ClamBakeSanta

Pearls of joy delight,
Sweetness dances on the tongue,
Laughter fills the air.
Happy #NationalTapiocaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Tall pines sway with cheer,
Lumberjacks laugh, axes flash,
Blue rivers flow bright.
Happy #PaulBunyanDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sweet cake fills the air,
Laughter dances like spring blooms,
Joy wraps all around.
#HappyBirthdayJeanJacquesRousseau from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Cake and joy dance on each plate,
Cheers for Mel's bright spark!
#HappyBirthdayMelBrooks from @ClamBakeSanta

Crunchy joy unfolds,
Sweet and nutty bliss awaits,
Taste that warms the heart.
Happy #NationalAlmondButtercrunchDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Lenses capture smiles,
Colors burst like blooms in spring,
Moments hold their breath.
Happy #CameraDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Soft winds whisper dreams,
Fanciful tales take to flight,
Stars join in the cheer.
#HappyBirthdayAntoinedeSaintExupery from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver light above,
Whispers of night softly hum,
Dreams float like soft clouds.
Happy #FullMoon from @ClamBakeSanta

Stars burst in the night,
Wishing trails of bright wonder,
Whispers of the sky.
Happy #NationalMeteorWatchDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright screens glow with cheer,
Voices mingle like soft song,
Connections so dear.
Happy #WorldSocialMediaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Voices weave like silk,
Laughter sparkles in warm air,
Dreams take flight tonight.
#HappyBirthdayLenaHorne from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright balloons take wing,
Laughter fills the sunlit room,
Cake and dreams unite.
#HappyBirthdayMikeTyson from @ClamBakeSanta

theme: National Creative Ice Cream Flavors Day
haiku:
Scoops of colors bright,
Lemon zests and berry sweet,
Dreams melt in each bite.
Happy #NationalCreativeIceCreamFlavorsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Tickles dance like summer breeze,
Smiles bloom bright and wide.
Happy #InternationalJokeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden sunbeams shine,
Laughter fills the soft sweet air,
Cake and dreams align.
#HappyBirthdayGeorgeSand from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden film lights glow,
Stars twinkle in velvet night,
Sweet dreams take their flight.
#HappyBirthdayOliviadeHavilland from @ClamBakeSanta
